User.title: User
User.description: Represents a store clerk, manager, or pharmacist

displayName.description: Full name of the system user

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Inventory product item for retail store or pharmacy

id.description: Unique product barcode or autogenerated ID

barcode.description: Universal product UPC/EAN or medical barcode

sellingPrice.description: Retail price before taxes and discounts

safetyStock.description: The threshold limit below which a restock alert triggers

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who modified this item

cashierId.description: UID of the cashier who logged the sale

shiftId.description: Unique active shift ID during sales order execution

subtotal.description: Sum of inventory item prices before tax/disc

discount.description: Operational flat discount applied to checkout

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of sales order confirmation

Shift.title: Shift
Shift.description: Cashier daily shift log (الوردية) for security audit

cashierId.description: UID of the cashier in control of the drawer

openingCash.description: Initial physical cash inside drawer (float balance)

cashSales.description: Sum total of cash payments recorded during shift

cardSales.description: Sum total of credit card transactions checked out

expectedCash.description: Calculated expected final cash: openingNew + cashSales

actualCash.description: Clerk raw physical cash count on close

discrepancy.description: Variance between expected cash tally and raw counted cash

users/{userId}.description: Stores security credentials, profiles, and shop branch roles for operators.

products/{productId}.description: Master list containing barcodes, pricing, stocks, safety thresholds, and expiration indicators.

sales_orders/{orderId}.description: Transaction receipts recording checkout amounts, cashier references, and line list item breakdowns.

shifts/{shiftId}.description: Active sales registers logs and drawers float checkpoints to regulate cash audits.
